calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Bond
Off Calendar Mar-18-2009 Off Calendar

Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-04-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Murray for the Petitioner. Anna Alexander and Michael Alexander were also present.

Mr. Alexander and Mrs. Alexander confirmed that all of the Grandchildren were minors. Mr. Murray presented oral argument to support his position with regard to the bond issue. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). The bond was set at $813,000.00 and is to remain until the youngest child turns 18 years of age. Status on filing of the bond was set for March 18, 2009.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Jackson.

Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Feb-18-2009 Continued To Mar-04-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
